name: Debit points - success (member ID)
description: Documented sample JSON response for a successful DebitPointsFromMembers run. PointsToDebit was 200.0 in the request; response echoes PointsDebited 200.0. Mirrors the doc's 'Here's an example with a member ID' request and the single 'Sample JSON Response' (lines 22844-22907).
notes: AUTHORITATIVE: Loyalty Management Business APIs Developer Guide v67.0. Resource is the generic "Loyalty Program Process" (Run a loyalty process), path /connect/loyalty/programs/${programName}/program-processes/${processName}; DebitPointsFromMembers is the processName (doc line 22568, 22822). Available version 56.0, HTTP method POST only (lines 22598-22603). Request body wrapper = processParameters (type "Loyalty Process Parameter Map", Required, v56.0); Response body = "Loyalty Process Output" (line 22633). Path placeholders programName + processName are Request parameters (both Required, v56.0). IMPLEMENTER-DEFINED: the doc explicitly states "The request and response parameters vary depending on the input and output parameters configured for the DebitPointsFromMembers process type in a Salesforce org" (line 22830). So the inner contents of TransactionJournal, PointsToDebit, and the response results[] (PointsDebited) are org-configured, only the documented sample shapes are reproduced here. Two request variants are documented (MemberId vs MembershipNumber, lines 22844 & 22863); fixture uses the MemberId variant. Only ONE response example is shown in the doc and it is a success (status:true), NO error/empty example is documented, so no error fixture was fabricated. Example URL in subsection uses v67.0 (line 22827). Note: a separate same-named "Debit Points" Standard Invocable Action exists at /actions/standard/debitPoints (line 34746), that is a DIFFERENT API and was not used.
